name: NQ high-VIX prior-day-down session long — mined board row 3
mined_source: F-NQ5_vixregime vixT2|prior_dn|long (net/day +0.24% of notional MINED, n=265, 1 neg yr of 7)
signal: non-roll RTH session with prior-day VIX close >= 21.4079 (mining tercile-2 boundary, FROZEN) AND prior session rth open->close return < -0.002

execution.data: nq_daily.parquet rows > 2024-06-30 (unfenced ONLY by gauntlet_run after gate-zero)

sizing_constitutional.declared_worst_case: intraday index long, no stop in mined config: worst-case = 10% adverse session (2x worst mining-window session)

thresholds.primary: stationary-block-bootstrap one-sided p(mean of DAILY constitutional net series > 0), L=5, 10000 draws, seed 42 (research.modern._lib.block_bootstrap_sharpe_diff_p vs zero arm)
thresholds.family: Benjamini-Hochberg across HYP-093/094/095 primary p-values, alpha=0.05, m=3
thresholds.daily_series: net constitutional return for EVERY trading day in the holdout window (0.0 on no-event days) — the %/day claim is over calendar of opportunity, not event days only
thresholds.tail_condition: no single session worse than -10% open->close (sizing premise)

abort: fewer than 40 signal sessions in holdout -> DATA_INSUFFICIENT
verdict_ladder: CONFIRMED (all: primary p<0.05, BH survivor, DSR>=0.95, constitutional floor met, tail condition met) / VALID_BUT_BELOW_FLOOR (significance yes, floor no) / NOT_ROBUST (tail/sizing premise violated) / NOT_SIGNIFICANT / DATA_INSUFFICIENT (coverage/abort conditions)
prior_materials: Mining board NON-EVIDENTIARY. Registered prior: NOT_SIGNIFICANT.
